title: The Sugar Trap: Yogurt vs. Candy
description: A data visualization project using Python and Seaborn to expose high sugar content in 'healthy' yogurt drinks compared to traditional candy.

title: The Cost of Convenience
description: An economic analysis of grocery data showing the price-per-calorie disparity between unprocessed and ultra-processed foods.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive website built with semantic HTML, CSS, and modular JavaScript to showcase data science projects and personal milestones.

title: Data Science Research
description: Ongoing research into local environmental data in the Colorado Rockies area.
